name: metrics: --tag key=value attaches metadata; multiple tags allowed; key restricted to [a-z0-9_]+
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/metrics.sh" --emit rule.runtime_ms --value 5 --tag rule=no-eval --tag phase=lint --file "$PWD/.claude-tdd-pro/metrics.jsonl" && grep -E '"tags":\{[^}]*"rule":"no-eval"[^}]*"phase":"lint"[^}]*\}' .claude-tdd-pro/metrics.jsonl 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
